data.body: op-cert epic round-6 remediation: resolved producer-signing seam (fork A) + runtime (Fargate+API GW SigV4+async jobs) as one design; corrected the round-5 premise that review_bot runs on Fargate (it is FastAPI+asyncio.Queue on the shared compose VM — pattern reused, deployment rejected for key isolation). Created 8d8e (producer seam) + 76d2 (IaC/deploy); rewrote ee0b/8f1d/6a89; epic addendum appended. Next: plan reviews to PASS on all five.
